libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For the 5.0.1 nativeTest/native runtime path, set runtime JVM system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 and WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient APIs; no external service is required. Avoid OAuth2WebClient coverage unless intentionally adding the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative; the issue is specifically a JDK 25 current-defaults native-image run failure.
The io.vertx:vertx-web-client artifact declares io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 as optional, so generated tests that exercise OAuth2WebClient without adding that dependency may fail to compile or run.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 has enough transitive dependencies for normal in-process HTTP client/server coverage and needs no Docker service, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x on JDK 25, so native runtime tests need the same Netty unsafe/reflection system properties already used for 5.0.0.
